_meta.description: Monthly segment-wise gross direct premium (non-life) from the GI Council Segmentwise Report. Stores both cumulative (ytd) and computed single-month (monthly) values per segment.
_meta.source: GI Council Segmentwise Report (Statistics → Industry Statistics)
_meta.note: Pending — GI Council 403s the runner. Set INGEST_FETCH_PROXY (India-IP relay) or drop the official XLSX into data/raw/gicouncil/segment/<YYYY-MM>.xlsx.
